title: allosorus pusillus
intro: Allosorus pusillus, also known as the bittercress or small bittercress, is a small annual plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allosorus pusillus include its ability to help manage digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Allosorus pusillus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
